   "reasoning": "We can't keep hemorrhaging teachers and students. A funding boost will at least give us some breathing room to think about our next move. I'm not convinced that hiring more staff will magically fix our problems, and the risk of those new employees burning out or not fitting in is too great. We can reallocate resources, boost teacher morale with some incentives, and get more transparency about our dropout risk.",
